_comment: Single source of truth for required environment variables. Read by both scripts/required-env.js (boot-time validator) and scripts/check-env-drift.sh (pre-deploy drift detector). When you add a new required var, add it here AND to .env.example — drift detection will then fail any deploy that hasn't propagated the value to .env.local.
_oneOfComment: Each group is an array. The validator passes if AT LEAST ONE group has all of its keys present and non-empty. Use this for cases like 'PRIVATE_KEY OR (CIRCLE_API_KEY + CIRCLE_ENTITY_SECRET)' where multiple configurations are valid.
_expectedValueComment: Keys whose presence is required to equal one of these values. Use sparingly — only for hard constraints like NODE_ENV=production.
